excerpts.evidence: The element that serves as an input and displays the combobox value has role combobox. When the combobox popup is not visible, the element with role combobox has aria-expanded set to false. When the popup element is visible, aria-expanded is set to true. The combobox has aria-haspopup set to a value that corresponds to the popup type; for a listbox popup, this is aria-haspopup="listbox".
excerpts.supportsGuideline: The trigger element must have role="combobox", aria-expanded (true when open, false when closed), and aria-haspopup="listbox".

excerpts.evidence: The popup is an element that has role listbox.
excerpts.supportsGuideline: The select content (popup) element must have role="listbox".

excerpts.evidence: When a suggested value is visually indicated as the currently selected value, the option containing that value has aria-selected set to true.
excerpts.supportsGuideline: Each select item must have role="option". The selected item must have aria-selected="true"; all others have aria-selected="false" or omit the attribute.

excerpts.evidence: Down Arrow: Moves focus to and selects the next option. If focus is on the last option, either returns focus to the combobox or does nothing. Up Arrow: Moves focus to and selects the previous option. If focus is on the first option, either returns focus to the combobox or does nothing. Home (Optional): Moves focus to and selects the first option. End (Optional): Moves focus to the last option.
excerpts.supportsGuideline: **Arrow Down** / **Arrow Up**: moves focus through options. **Home** (optional): first option. **End** (optional): last option.

excerpts.evidence: Enter: Accepts the focused option in the listbox by closing the popup, placing the accepted value in the combobox. Escape: Closes the popup and returns focus to the combobox.
excerpts.supportsGuideline: **Enter**: selects the focused option and closes the listbox. **Escape**: closes the listbox without changing the selection and returns focus to the trigger.
